error_signature: expression not evaluated correctly in if node
title: Expression not evaluated correctly in if node
symptom: When using dynamic expressions in the if node, the output is not evaluated correctly, returning the expression as a string instead of a boolean value.
applies_when: Using dynamic expressions from input parameters
Trying to evaluate expressions in the if node
not_this_if: Expressions are hardcoded directly in the if node
root_cause: The if node does not evaluate expressions correctly when they are passed as strings. Instead of evaluating the expression, it treats it as a literal string unless properly formatted with double handlebars.
fix_steps: Wrap the expression in double handlebars: {{ {{ $evaluateExpression($json.expression) }} }}
Ensure to escape the inner closing handlebars with a backslash: \}}
agent_instruction: Wrap your dynamic expression in double handlebars and escape the inner closing handlebars.
